name: fixtures: each g-ts-001..008 has a positive fixture (input that triggers the rule)
command: for i in 001 002 003 004 005 006 007 008; do FOUND=0; for base in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/fixtures/typescript/g-ts-$i/positive" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/fixtures/ts/g-ts-$i/positive"; do [ -d "$base" ] && FOUND=1; done; [ "$FOUND" = "1" ] || { echo "FAIL g-ts-$i positive missing" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
